rationale: Demoted HIGH → LOW. Plan-and-Solve framing tweaks were the proposed fix for the all-100 confidence floor. t0019, t0020, and t0027 now show the floor is content-driven, not template-driven: ECE B=0.336 / C=0.374 in t0027 confirms further template iteration cannot unstick the calibration problem. RQ2 closure requires a content-driven calibrator (S-0027-01), not framing variants.
